description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical orange body and two white horizontal reflective stripes near the top. The surface of the cone is visibly dirty, with dark smudges and stains distributed unevenly around the cone, indicating significant use in outdoor environments. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, colored orange, and the base is a thick, square, black platform that provides stability. The base appears to be made of a heavier material, likely rubber, to prevent tipping, while the cone itself is made of a flexible plastic or rubber. There are no visible logos, text, or other markings on the cone. The overall condition of the cone is worn and dirty, with no visible cracks or structural damage.
description: A worn, dirty orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a thick black square base. The cone shows visible smudges and signs of heavy outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white reflective stripes and prominent dark smudges, especially on the upper and lower sections.
description_view_1: This view highlights a large dark stain on the lower right side of the cone and clear visibility of both white stripes.
description_view_2: The cone's left side is visible, with a large dark smudge near the base and less dirt on the upper section; both stripes are partially visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the back of the cone with a large dark smudge on the lower left and a more even distribution of dirt across the surface.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two white reflective stripes encircle the cone near the top; both are of medium width and evenly spaced.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is a thick, square, black platform, likely made of rubber for stability, with a flat surface and no visible patterns.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible smudges and stains but no cracks or structural damage.
